// src/components/Dashboard.js import React from 'react'; import './Dashboard.css'; const Dashboard = () => { const currentDate = new Date(); const options = { month: 'long', day: 'numeric', weekday: 'long' }; const formattedDate = currentDate.toLocaleDateString('pt-BR', options).split(' '); return (

{formattedDate[2]}

); }; export default Dashboard;
